overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy mountain forest at night. The character travels along a dirt path, briefly pauses to observe the sky and peaks, then continues toward and passes through a campsite with NPCs and fires.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the snowy pine forest

entered.detail: dense evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the path
dense evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the path
large mountain peaks covered in snow visible through the trees ahead
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with patches of snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt path through a dense snowy forest. Tall pine trees line both sides while snow-covered mountains loom in the distance under the night sky, with snowflakes falling steadily.

events.description: character stops walking and tilts camera upward to look at the mountain peaks and night sky

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the snow-covered mountain peaks and cloudy night sky

entered.detail: dark blue night sky with scattered clouds visible above the treeline

segments.scene_description: The character stops and looks upward, revealing the expansive night sky with clouds and the jagged snow-covered mountain peaks above the treeline. The camera tilts up to capture the scale of the mountains against the dark sky.

events.description: warm orange campfire lights become visible in the distance ahead through the trees

agents.ego_description: resuming walk along the path toward the distant campfire lights

entered.detail: warm orange glow of campfires visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the forest path as distant warm campfire lights appear ahead through the trees, providing a contrast to the cold blue surroundings. The lights grow gradually larger as the character approaches.

events.description: entering a campsite with NPCs gathered around burning fires on both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the campsite past NPCs gathered around fires

notable_agents.action: standing guard near campfire holding a torch
sitting by the fire with camping gear nearby

entered.detail: burning campfire with orange flames and glowing embers
burning campfire illuminating nearby wooden logs and equipment
wooden logs and camping equipment arranged around the fires

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a small forest campsite where NPCs gather around crackling fires that cast warm light on the snowy ground. After passing the camp and the standing guards, the character continues back into the dark snowy woods along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a cold, nocturnal mountain forest that briefly transitions into the warmth of a wilderness camp before returning to the dark woods. It begins with the character walking along a winding dirt path flanked by dense pine trees and distant, snow-covered peaks under a steady fall of snowflakes. As the character pauses, the camera tilts upward to reveal the expansive night sky and the jagged scale of the mountains looming above the treeline. The scene then shifts back to the path as distant, warm campfire lights emerge through the trees, growing larger and contrasting with the cold blue surroundings. Finally, the camera moves through a small campsite where NPCs gather around crackling fires before following the character as they leave the guards behind and disappear back into the dark, snowy forest.
